overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a third-person perspective showing a character sitting on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast pastoral landscape. The view encompasses rolling green hills, scattered deciduous forests, and distant mountain ranges under a partly cloudy afternoon sky with warm golden lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook above pastoral valley

events.description: character raises right arm to adjust hat or shield eyes while looking toward the horizon
character shifts sitting position slightly, turning body to adjust posture on the rock

agents.ego_description: character sitting on rocky outcrop, maintaining a contemplative pose while surveying the vast landscape, occasionally making minor adjustments to sitting position

entered.detail: large grey stone cliff edge where the character is seated, occupying the right foreground of the frame
layered blue-hued mountains forming the horizon line under the cloudy sky
dense cluster of green deciduous trees covering the left middle-ground hills
scattered tree coverage on the right side of the valley
rolling green grassland and fields stretching between the cliff and the distant mountains

segments.scene_description: A static third-person shot shows a lone character sitting on a rocky cliff edge overlooking an expansive summer landscape. The scene features rolling green pastures, scattered forests, and distant mountains under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. The character remains mostly still, occasionally shifting position while observing the serene vista, with no other agents or vehicles present in the remote natural setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative perspective of a lone character perched on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast, serene summer wilderness. It begins with a static view of the figure sitting still against the rugged edge, framing the expansive scale of the rolling green pastures and scattered forests below. As the character occasionally shifts their position, the camera captures the subtle movement against the backdrop of distant mountain ranges. The scene remains focused on this quiet observation, emphasizing the stillness of the remote natural setting under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.
